channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Medicare Anti-Fraud Strategy Achieves Record $42 Billion in Savings
New Trump UFO File Release Includes Military Footage of Mysterious Star-Shaped Object
item.description: Declassified infrared videos from military sensors show unidentified objects over the Yellow Sea and near the Pantex nuclear weapons facility.

item.title: Trump: Iran Would Be Obliterated If I'm Killed
item.description: Downplaying reports of a new Iranian assassination plot, President Donald Trump told an interviewer he has "left instructions" for a severe response.

item.title: Another Autopsy the Democrats Do Not Want to Read – The Maine Debacle Was Entirely Their Own Creation
